requirements.task_name: Request a quote for a 3-story office building with the shortest timeline under 12 months
requirements.task_description: Navigate to commercial building services, open the 3–5 story office service, and submit a quote request for a 3-story office in Denver with a $2,000,000 budget, selecting the shortest available completion timeline that is 12 months or less.

requirements.task_name: Find and add to comparison a large hospital project case study in Texas after 2020
requirements.task_description: Locate a healthcare case study in Texas with a budget of at least $50M completed in 2021 or later, using filters and sorting by most recent completion date, then add that project to the comparison list.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a warehouse site visit at the nearest branch within 50 km
requirements.task_description: Use the branch locator to find the nearest branch to ZIP code 94107 within 50 km, then schedule a warehouse/industrial site visit at that branch for August 15, 2026 in the earliest available morning slot before 11:00 AM.

requirements.task_name: Rent an excavator and concrete mixer for 5 days under specific constraints
requirements.task_description: Use the equipment rental section to rent one excavator (at least 18 tons) and one concrete mixer (capacity 5+ cu ft, 4+ star rating) for June 1–5, 2026, selecting the cheapest excavator under a $700 daily rate and adding standard damage waiver insurance for both items before proceeding to the rental summary.

required_variables.set_condition: Set to true whenever getRentalSummary() is called (i.e., when the rental summary page is loaded or refreshed).
required_variables.reason: There is currently no persistent indication that the user has proceeded from the cart to the rental summary. This flag allows the evaluator to confirm that the final step ('proceed to rental summary') was actually reached, while all other constraints are checked via existing cart and equipment data.

requirements.task_name: Select an industrial maintenance plan with fast response under $1,500/month
requirements.task_description: From the maintenance programs, filter for industrial facilities with emergency response time up to 2 hours and a maximum monthly fee of $1,500, sort by the longest warranty, and add the top plan to a quote request.

requirements.task_name: Register for the cheapest 2+ day construction safety course starting in April 2026
requirements.task_description: Search for construction safety training, filter sessions to start in April 2026 with durations of 2 days or longer, sort by price, select the cheapest option, and complete registration for one participant.

requirements.task_name: Generate and send a cost estimate for a 10,000 sq ft warehouse renovation in Chicago
requirements.task_description: Use the online cost calculator to estimate the cost of a 10,000 sq ft warehouse renovation in Chicago with high-efficiency HVAC and a target energy savings of at least 15%, then send the estimate through the built-in quote form.

requirements.task_name: Submit a design-build inquiry for a mid-sized retail store with specific budget and contact preferences
requirements.task_description: Use the contact page to submit a design-build inquiry for an 8,000 sq ft retail store with a budget range of $500,000–$800,000, a project start date in October 2026, indicating that you heard about the company via an online search and prefer phone contact between 2–4 PM.
